description_long: This object consists of three identical, rectangular tables arranged side by side, each with a dark wood grain finish and simple, straight legs. The tables have flat tops and open undersides, with no drawers or additional features, and each is supported by four sturdy legs. The wood grain pattern is visible on the tabletop and legs, giving the set a natural and elegant appearance. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or embellishments. The tables are spaced evenly apart, suggesting they are intended to be used together as a modular set, possibly for outdoor or communal urban settings. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for supporting various objects or for use in public spaces.
description: A set of three dark wood grain rectangular tables with simple, straight legs and a minimalist design. The tables are arranged side by side, featuring clean lines and a robust, natural appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three tables aligned in a row, highlighting the thickness of the tabletops and the straight, sturdy legs.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the open undersides and the back edges of the three tables, emphasizing their uniform spacing and identical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the alignment and thickness of the tabletops and the straight legs.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three table tops and the open space beneath each, with the wood grain pattern clearly visible on the surfaces.
